text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Okay, now I just have to buy—

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You're Mejiro Dober, aren't you? Can I have
your autograph?!

text_block_list.name: Man B
text_block_list.text: Can I shake your hand?! Please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! I'm in a hurry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I thought I'd gotten better at dealing with men,
but getting mobbed like that was... Urgh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems it'll take some time before Mejiro Dober
gets over her aversion to men.
